snippet.title: ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎ±Ў≥ўЕ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ£ўБЎґўД Ў£ўЖ Ў™Ў£ЎЃЎ∞ ЎІўДЎ™Ў≠ЎѓўК ЎІўДЎђЎІЎ¶Ў≤Ў© #4
snippet.description:
ўЕЎЂўКЎ± ўДўДЎѓўЗЎіЎ© Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДўВЎѓЎ±Ў© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕ ўКўЕўГўЖ Ў£ўЖ Ў™ўВЎ±Ў± ЎІўДўЕЎµўКЎ±!  ўДЎІ Ў™ЎµЎѓўВўИЎІЎЯ  Ў•Ў∞ўЖ ЎєўДўКўГўЕ ўБўВЎЈ ўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ Multi Do!  ЎІЎђўДЎ≥ўИЎІ Ў®ЎіўГўД ўЕЎ±ўКЎ≠ ЎМ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ Ў£ўЖЎ™ўЕ ЎІўЖўБЎ≥ўГўЕ Ў≥Ў™ўБўЗўЕўИўЖ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ°!

Ў™Ў£ўГЎѓ ўЕўЖ ўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўГЎ© ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎ™Ў≠ЎѓўК ўЕЎє Ў•ЎЃўИЎ™ўГ ўИЎ£ЎµЎѓўВЎІЎ¶ўГ! ўИўДЎІ Ў™ўЖЎ≥ўЙ Ў£ўЖ Ў™ЎЄўЗЎ±  Multi DO Arabic CHALLENGE  ЎєўДўЙ ўКўИЎ™ўКўИЎ® Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўДЎІ Ў™ўБўИЎ™ўГ ЎІўДўЕЎ≤ўКЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИўЗЎІЎ™ ЎІўДўБЎЄўКЎєЎ©!

ўИЎіўЗўВЎІЎ™ ЎµЎѓЎ±ўК ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ®ўГўК ўЕЎІ Ў™Ў≥ўЕЎєўК 
ўИЎ≠Ў™ўЙ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ Ў≠ўЖўКЎ™ўК ўДЎІ Ў™Ў±ЎђЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў≤ўЖўК ўИўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎєўГ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎєўДўСўК

Ў®ўКўГўБўК ЎІўЖЎІ Ў™ўИЎђЎєЎ™ ўЕЎІ Ў™Ў™ўИЎђЎєўК
ЎєўКЎіўК Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўГ Ў®ЎІўДўЗўЖЎІ ўИ Ў™ўЕЎ™ЎєўК
ЎµЎІЎ± ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ ўВўИўДўКўЗЎІ ўКўДЎІ Ў™ЎіЎђЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў≤ўЖўК ўИўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎєўГ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎєўДўКўЛ

ўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£ўДўЕ ўЕЎІ ЎґўД Ў®ўГўК Ў®ўЕЎѓўЕЎєўК
ўИўЖЎіўБЎ™ ЎєЎ±ўИўВўК ўДўЕЎІ ўЕЎІ ЎєЎѓЎ™ўК ўЕЎєўК
Ў±ўКЎ≠ўК Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК ўИЎІўДўЖўБўОЎ≥ ЎєўЖўК ЎІўВЎЈЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™ЎіўКўДўК ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ•Ў≠Ў≥ЎІЎ≥ ўЕўКЎ™

ўЕўЖ ЎѓўИўЖ ўЕЎІ Ў™Ў≠ўГўК Ў≠ўГўКЎ™ўК Ў®ўДЎІ ўИЎєўК
ўГўД ЎіўК ЎІўЖўБўЗўЕ ЎІЎ±ЎђўИўГўК Ў®ўКўГўБўК Ў™ЎѓЎєўК
Ў•ўЖЎ≥ўК Ў•Ў∞ЎІ Ў®Ў™Ў±ўКЎѓўК ЎіўИ ЎєўЕўДЎ™ўК ўЕЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў≤ўЖўК ўИ ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎєўГ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎєўДўКўС

ўЕЎі ЎµўИЎ™ўК ўЗўКЎѓўК ЎІўДЎ±ўИЎ≠ ЎєўЕЎ™ЎЈўДЎє ўЕЎєўК
Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК ЎєўЕ Ў™ўБЎІЎ±ўВўЖўК ўЕўЖ Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК ЎІЎЈўДЎєўК
ЎІЎ±Ў™ЎІЎ≠ўК ЎІўЖЎІ ўИЎєўЕ Ў®ўЕўИЎ™ ўЕЎІ Ў®ўВўДўГ Ў™ЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў≤ўЖўК ўИ ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎєўГ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎєўДўКўС

Ў®ўКўГўБўК ЎІўЖЎІ Ў™ўИЎђЎєЎ™ ўЕЎІ Ў™Ў™ўИЎђЎєўК
ЎєўКЎіўК Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўГ Ў®ЎІўДўЗўЖЎІ ўИ Ў™ўЕЎ™ЎєўК
ЎµЎІЎ± ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ ўВўИўДўКўЗЎІ ўКўДЎІ Ў™ЎіЎђЎєўК

ўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£ўДўЕ ўЕЎІ ЎґўД Ў®ўГўК Ў®ўЕЎѓўЕЎєўК
ўИўЖЎіўБЎ™ ЎєЎ±ўИўВўК ўДўЕЎІ ўЕЎІ ЎєЎѓЎ™ўК ўЕЎєўК
Ў±ўКЎ≠ўК Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК ўИЎІўДўЖўБўОЎ≥ ЎєўЖўК ЎІўВЎЈЎєўК
ўИўДЎІ Ў™ЎіўКўДўК ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ•Ў≠Ў≥ЎІЎ≥ ўЕўКЎ™"

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

ЎєЎІЎ≤ўБ ЎІўДЎ£ўИЎ±ЎЇ: ЎІўДўБўЖЎІўЖ ЎєЎІЎЈўБ ЎІЎ®ўИ ЎІўДўДўКўД

Ў™ўЕўС ЎІўДЎ™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ўБўК ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўИЎѓўКўИўЗЎІЎ™: ЎђўБЎ±ЎІ
Ў™ЎµўИўКЎ±:  Gazalen Production - ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎЇЎ≤ЎІўДўКўЖ 

ўГўИўГЎ™ўКўД ўЖЎІЎ± 
ўЕЎє ЎІўДўЖЎђўЕЎ© ЎІЎµЎІўДўЗ ўКўИЎ≥ўБ ўИўЕўДўГ ЎІўДўЕЎђўИЎ≤ ЎІЎіЎ±ўБ ЎІЎ®ўИ ЎІўДўДўКўД ...

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвАЩs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвАЩs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

Directed by Bruno Mars and Florent Dechard 
Phil Tayag - creative consultant

Lyrics: 
Say baby, say baby, say baby

What you doin 

(what you doin)


Where you at

(where you at)


Oh you got plans  

(you got plans)


DonвАЩt say that       

(shut yo trap)


IвАЩm sippin wine     

(sip sip)


In a robe               

(drip drip)


I look too good    

(look too good)


To be alone         

(wooohooo)


My house clean  

(house clean)

 
My pool warm   

(pool warm)

 
Just shaved        

(smooth like a new born)

 
We should be dancing, romancing

In the east wing and the west wing

Of this mansion, whatвАЩs happenin

 

I aint playin no games

Every word that I say 

Is coming straight from the heart

(so if you tryna lay in these arms)

 

Imma leave the door open

(imma leave the door open)

Imma leave the door open girl

(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

 
That you feel the way I feel

And you want me like I want you tonight baby

(tell me that youвАЩre coming through) 


 
YouвАЩre so sweet 

(so sweet)

 
So tight

(so tight)

 
I wonвАЩt bite

(ahh ahh)

 
Unless you like

(unless you like)

 
If you smoke

(what you smoke)

 

I got that haze

(purple haze)

 
And if youвАЩre hungry girl I got filets

(woohooo)

 
Ooh baby donвАЩt keep me 

(waiting)

ThereвАЩs so much love we could be making

(Shamone)

IвАЩm talking kissing, Cuddling

Rose petals in the bathtub

Girl lets jump in, ItвАЩs bubblin


I aint playin no games

Every word that I say 

Is coming straight from the heart

So if you tryna lay in these arms

( if you tryna lay in these arms)



Imma leave the door open

(imma leave the door open)

Imma leave the door open girl

(Imma leave the door open, hopin)


That you feel the way I feel

And you want me like I want you tonight baby

(tell me that youвАЩre coming through)

 
La la laaa la la la laaa 

(I need you baby)

 
La la laaa la la la laaa

(I gotta see you baby)


La la laaa la la la laaa 

(Girl IвАЩm tryna give you this)

(aaaaahhhhhhhhhh)


Imma leave my door open, baby

(imma leave the door open)

Imma leave, imma leave my door open girl

(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

And IвАЩm hopin



Hopin that you feel the way I feel

And you want me like I want you tonight baby

(tell me that youвАЩre coming through)

 

La la laaa la la la laaa

Tell me

(Tell me that youвАЩre coming through)

 

Woo, woo-woo, woo, woo-woo,woo

Woo-woo

Woo, woo-woo, woo, woo-woo,woo

Woo-woo

 

La la laaa la la la laaa

(Tell me that youвАЩre coming through)

 

Girl, IвАЩm here just waiting for you

Come on over, IвАЩll adore you

(I gotta know)

(La la laaa la la la laaa)

IвАЩm waiting, waiting, waiting for you

 

(Tell me that youвАЩre coming through)

Girl, IвАЩm here just waiting for you

Come on over, IвАЩll adore you


The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

#BrunoMars #AndersonPaak #SilkSonic #LeaveTheDoorOpen

YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.
